title: Cove 2
content: Frequently referred to as “Alki Cove 2” or just “Cove 2”, this site is one of the most frequently visited dive sites in Puget Sound. Just minutes from downtown Seattle and with easy access to parking and the beach, this is the perfect site to visit on the weekend or for a quick dive during the week after work. Here are the key characteristics of the Cove 2 Dive Site:. It is a shore diving site, meaning divers enter the water from the shoreline, eliminating the need for a boat. 9. **Community and Training**: Cove 2 has a vibrant diving community, and local dive shops often organize group dives and events at the site. In summary, Cove 2 in West Seattle, Washington, offers divers a rewarding underwater experience with its diverse marine life, underwater terrain, and convenient shore access. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced diver, Cove 2 provides an opportunity to explore the captivating underwater world of the Puget Sound.

title: Scuba diving @ Cove 2 - Review of Alki Beach, Seattle, WA
content: Fun place to Dive, good facilities, good parking, and has a rinse station as well. Plenty of wildlife and I saw a Baby Octopus. It is a good dive for beginners

title: Freediving practice at Alki Seacrest Park Cove 2 - Facebook
content: The sun was shining bright and the water was flat as glass. The visibility was amazing. I haven't seen the water this clear in the Puget Sound in a very long
